output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <string>
#include <cstdint>

struct NetworkPacket {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::string username;
    std::vector<uint32_t> scores;
    std::string metadata;
    
    void serialise(auto& stream) {
        // Write packet_id in big-endian
        const auto packet_id_swapped = hexi::endian::native_to_big(packet_id);
        stream.put(&packet_id_swapped, sizeof(packet_id_swapped));

        // Write username with 4-byte prefix
        stream.put(hexi::prefixed(username, 4));

        // Write scores count (4-byte prefix) followed by elements in big-endian
        const auto scores_count = hexi::endian::native_to_big(static_cast<uint32_t>(scores.size()));
        stream.put(&scores_count, sizeof(scores_count));
        for (const auto& score : scores) {
            const auto swapped = hexi::endian::native_to_big(score);
            stream.put(&swapped, sizeof(swapped));
        }

        // Write metadata as null terminated
        stream.put(hexi::null_terminated(metadata));
    }
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_packet(const NetworkPacket& packet) {
    hexi::dynamic_buffer buffer;
    buffer.write_seek(hexi::sk_absolute, 0); // Clear the buffer

    try {
        hexi::stream stream(buffer);
        packet.serialise(stream);
    } catch (...) {
        // Handle exceptions if needed
    }

    const auto data = buffer.read_data();
    return { data, data + buffer.size() };
}
```</answer>

    // Read username with 4-byte prefix
    std::string username;
    stream >> hexi::prefixed(username, 4);
    np.username = username;

    // Read scores count
    uint32_t scores_count = 0;
    stream.get(&scores_count, sizeof(scores_count));
    scores_count = hexi::endian::le_to_native(scores_count);

    // Read scores using read_adaptor
    hexi::read_adaptor adaptor(np.scores, scores_count);
    stream >> adaptor;

    // Read metadata as null-terminated string
    std::string_view metadata_view;
    stream >> hexi::terminated(metadata_view);
    np.metadata = metadata_view; // Metadata is copied here, but this is the closest to zero-copy

    // Skip padding
    const auto padding_size = buffer.size() - stream.read_offset();
    if (padding_size > 0) {
        char dummy[padding_size];
        stream.get(dummy, padding_size);
    }

    return np;
}

struct PacketInfo {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::string_view username;
};

PacketInfo extract_packet_info(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::buffer_sequence buf_seq(buffer.data(), buffer.size());
    hexi::stream stream(buf_seq);
    PacketInfo pi;

    // Get packet_id via span
    const auto packet_id_span = buffer.first<4>();
    pi.packet_id = hexi::endian::le_to_native(*reinterpret_cast<const uint32_t*>(packet_id_span.data()));

    // Read username with 4-byte prefix
    std::string_view username_view;
    stream >> hexi::prefixed(username_view, 4);
    pi.username = username_view;

    // Read scores count and skip scores data
    uint32_t scores_count = 0;
    stream.get(&scores_count, sizeof(scores_count));
    scores_count = hexi::endian::le_to_native(scores_count);
    const auto scores_skip = scores_count * sizeof(uint32_t);
    char dummy[scores_skip];
    stream.get(dummy, scores_skip);

    // Skip metadata (null-terminated)
    auto read_offset = stream.read_offset();
    const auto data = buffer.data() + read_offset;
    const auto metadata_len = buffer.find_first_of(0, read_offset);
    const auto total_skip = metadata_len - read_offset + 1; // include null terminator
    char metadata_dummy[total_skip];
    stream.get(metadata_dummy, total_skip);

    return pi;
}

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>

struct DataResult {
    uint8_t data_type;
    std::vector<uint32_t> int_items;
    std::vector<float> float_items;
};

DataResult preview_and_read_data(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    DataResult result;
    
    if (buffer.empty()) {
        return result;
    }
    result.data_type = buffer[0];
    
    // Use buffer_adaptor to read from the remaining buffer
    hexi::buffer_adaptor<std::span<const uint8_t>> adaptor(buffer.subspan(1));
    hexi::binary_stream stream(adaptor);
    
    uint32_t item_count = 0;
    stream >> hexi::endian::le(item_count); // Read item_count with endian conversion
    
    // Calculate minimum required buffer size
    const auto min_req_size = 1 + 4 + item_count * 4;
    if (buffer.size() < min_req_size) {
        return result;
    }
    
    // Read items based on data type
    if (result.data_type == 0) {
        result.int_items.resize(item_count);
        stream >> hexi::endian::le(result.int_items, item_count); // Read integers with conversion
    } else if (result.data_type == 1) {
        result.float_items.resize(item_count);
        stream >> result.float_items; // Floats don't require endian conversion
    }
    
    return result;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

bool write_data_with_check(std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer, uint32_t header, const std::vector<uint32_t>& items) {
    const auto required_size = sizeof(uint32_t) + items.size() * sizeof(uint32_t);
    
    if (buffer.size() + required_size > buffer.capacity()) {
        return false;
    }
    
    hexi::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<uint8_t>> adaptor(buffer);
    hexi::binary_stream stream(adaptor);
    
    stream.put(&header, sizeof(header));
    stream.put_container(items);
    
    return true;
}
```</answer>

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <hexi/concepts.h>
#include <hexi/dynamic_buffer.h>
#include <hexi/exception.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <hexi/file_buffer.h>
#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <hexi/static_buffer.h>
#include <hexi/null_buffer.h>
#include <hexi/stream_adaptors.h>
#include <concepts>
#include <span>
#include <cassert>
#include <cstddef>
#include <cstring>

struct PacketHeader {
    uint32_t magic;
    uint16_t version;
    uint16_t flags;
};

PacketHeader read_header_with_span(const std::span<const char> buffer) {
    constexpr auto header_size = sizeof(PacketHeader);
    assert(buffer.size() >= header_size && "Chained buffer too small!");
    
    hexi::buffer_adaptor< const char > buffer_read(buffer.data(), buffer.size());
    hexi::binary_stream stream(buffer_read);
    
    PacketHeader header{};
    stream >> header.magic >> header.version >> header.flags;
    
    // Convert from little-endian if needed
    header.magic = hexi::endian::le_to_native(header.magic);
    header.version = hexi::endian::le_to_native(header.version);
    header.flags = hexi::endian::le_to_native(header.flags);
    
    return header;
}
```</answer>

output.reasoning:
<think>Okay, I need to implement the peek_data_from_buffer function using the Hexi library's dynamic_buffer. The goal is to copy a certain number of bytes from the buffer into a destination vector without moving the read cursor. Let me think about how dynamic buffers work in this context.

First, I remember that in many buffer implementations, the read and write cursors are separate. <answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <cstdint>

template<typename T>
T convert_to_big_endian(T value) {
    return hexi::endian::native_to_big(value);
}

template<typename T>
T convert_from_big_endian(T value) {
    return hexi::endian::big_to_native(value);
}

template<typename T>
T convert_to_little_endian(T value) {
    return hexi::endian::native_to_little(value);
}

template<typename T>
T convert_from_little_endian(T value) {
    return hexi::endian::little_to_native(value);
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/detail/intrusive_storage.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
std::vector<uint8_t> preview_data_without_consuming(const hexi::detail::intrusive_storage<block_size>& storage, size_t bytes_to_preview) {
    const auto data = storage.read_ptr();
    const auto read_size = storage.size();
    const size_t copy_size = std::min(read_size, bytes_to_preview);
    std::vector<uint8_t> destination(copy_size);
    memcpy(destination.data(), data, copy_size);
    return destination;
}

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
struct BufferStatus {
    size_t readable_size;
    size_t free_space;
};

BufferStatus<> check_buffer_status(const hexi::detail::intrusive_storage<1024>& storage) {
    return {
        storage.size(),
        storage.free()
    };
}

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
void reset_buffer(hexi::detail::intrusive_storage<block_size>& storage) {
    storage.clear();
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/file_buffer.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <filesystem>

std::vector<uint8_t> read_file_data(const std::filesystem::path& file_path, size_t bytes_to_read) {
    hexi::file_buffer buffer(file_path.string().c_str());
    std::vector<uint8_t> destination(bytes_to_read);
    buffer.read(destination.data(), bytes_to_read);
    return destination;
}

std::vector<uint8_t> preview_file_data(const std::filesystem::path& file_path, size_t bytes_to_preview) {
    hexi::file_buffer buffer(file_path.string().c_str());
    std::vector<uint8_t> destination(bytes_to_preview);
    buffer.copy(destination.data(), bytes_to_preview);
    return destination;
}

void write_file_data(const std::filesystem::path& file_path, const std::vector<uint8_t>& data) {
    hexi::file_buffer buffer(file_path.string().c_str(), hexi::buffer_write);
    buffer.write(data.data(), data.size());
}

size_t get_file_size(const std::filesystem::path& file_path) {
    hexi::file_buffer buffer(file_path.string().c_str());
    return buffer.size();
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/file_buffer.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <hexi/exception.h>
#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <filesystem>
#include <cstddef>

uint32_t read_uint32_from_file(const std::filesystem::path& file_path) {
    hexi::file_buffer file(file_path.string().c_str(), hexi::file_buffer::buffer_read);

    if (file.size() < sizeof(uint32_t)) {
        HEXI_THROW(hexi::buffer_underrun(file.size(), sizeof(uint32_t)));
    }

    uint32_t value = 0;
    file.get(&value, sizeof(value));
    return hexi::endian::letoh(value);
}

void write_uint32_to_file(const std::filesystem::path& file_path, uint32_t value) {
    hexi::file_buffer file(file_path.string().c_str(), hexi::file_buffer::buffer_write);
    uint32_t swapped = hexi::endian::htole(value);
    file.put(&swapped, sizeof(swapped));
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/static_buffer.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

template<size_t buffer_size = 1024>
void write_data_to_buffer(hexi::static_buffer<std::byte, buffer_size>& buffer, const std::vector<uint8_t>& data) {
    buffer.write(data.data(), data.size());
}

template<size_t buffer_size = 1024>
std::vector<uint8_t> read_data_from_buffer(hexi::static_buffer<std::byte, buffer_size>& buffer, size_t bytes_to_read) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> target(bytes_to_read);
    buffer.read(target.data(), bytes_to_read);
    return target;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/static_buffer.h>

template<size_t buffer_size = 1024>
std::vector<uint8_t> preview_buffer_data(const hexi::static_buffer<std::byte, buffer_size>& buffer, size_t bytes_to_preview) {

    return dest;
}

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_writer.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_reader.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

void write_container_to_stream(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_writer& writer, const std::vector<uint32_t>& container) {
    const uint32_t count = static_cast<uint32_t>(container.size());
    writer.write(&count, sizeof(count));
    for (const auto& element : container) {
        writer.write(&element, sizeof(element));
    }
}

std::vector<uint32_t> read_container_from_stream(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_reader& reader) {
    uint32_t count = 0;
    reader.read(&count, sizeof(count));
    std::vector<uint32_t> target(count);
    for (uint32_t i = 0; i < count; ++i) {
        uint32_t element = 0;
        reader.read(&element, sizeof(element));
        target[i] = element;
    }
    return target;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_writer.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_reader.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

using namespace hexi::detail;

template<typename T>
std::size_t encode_varint(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_writer& writer, T value) {
    std::size_t written = 0;

    while(value > 0x7f) {
        const std::uint8_t byte = (value >> 7) & 0x7f | 0x80;
        writer.put(&byte, 1);
        value &= 0x7f;
        ++written;

        reader.get(&byte, 1);
        value = (value <<7) + (static_cast<T>(byte & 0x7f));
    } while(byte & 0x80);

    return value;
}

template<typename T>
bool encode_decode_roundtrip(T original_value) {
    std::vector<std::uint8_t> buffer;
    hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::uint8_t>> adaptor(buffer);
    hexi::pmc::binary_stream stream(adaptor);
    hexi::pmc::binary_stream_writer& writer = stream.get_writer();
    hexi::pmc::binary_stream_reader& reader = stream.get_reader();

    // Encode
    std::size_t written = encode_varint<T>(writer, original_value);
    if(written == static_cast<std::size_t>(-1)) { // error?
        return false;
    }

    // Decode
    T decoded = decode_varint<T>(reader);

    return decoded == original_value;
}

using namespace hexi::detail;

template<typename T>
std::size_t encode_varint(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_writer& writer, T value) {
    std::size_t written = 0;

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <cstring>
#include <cstddef>

using namespace hexi::detail;

bool check_regions_overlap(const void* src, std::size_t src_len, const void* dst, std::size_t dst_len) {
    auto src_beg = std::bit_cast<std::uintptr_t>(src);
    auto src_end = src_beg + src_len;
    auto dst_beg = std::bit_cast<std::uintptr_t>(dst);
    auto dst_end = dst_beg + dst_len;
    return src_beg < dst_end && dst_beg < src_end;
}

bool safe_memory_copy(void* destination, const void* source, std::size_t length) {
    if (check_regions_overlap(source, length, destination, length)) {
        memmove(destination, source, length);
    } else {
        memcpy(destination, source, length);
    }
    return true;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <array>
#include <cstdint>

using namespace hexi::detail;

template<std::size_t Size>
constexpr auto create_filled_array(std::uint8_t value) {
    std::array<std::uint8_t, Size> target{};
    for(std::size_t i = 0; i < Size; ++i) {
        target[i] = value;
    }
    return target;
}

template<std::size_t Size>
bool verify_filled_array(const std::array<std::uint8_t, Size>& arr, std::uint8_t expected) {
    for(const auto& elem : arr) {
        if(elem != expected) return false;
    }
    return true;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/exception.h>
#include <string>
#include <cstddef>

struct ExceptionDetails {
    std::size_t read_size;
    std::size_t total_read;
    std::size_t limit_or_size;
    std::string message;
};

ExceptionDetails extract_underrun_info(const hexi::buffer_underrun& e) {
    return {
        e.read_size(),
        e.total_read(),
        e.buffer_size(),
        e.what()
    };
}

ExceptionDetails extract_read_limit_info(const hexi::stream_read_limit& e) {
    return {
        e.read_size(),
        e.total_read(),
        e.read_limit(),
        e.what()
    };
}

std::string get_exception_message(const hexi::exception& e) {
    return e.what();
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>

struct CompactPacket {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::vector<std::string> tags;
    std::string data;
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_compact_packet(const CompactPacket& packet) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer;

    hexi::varint_encode(buffer, packet.packet_id);

    // Serialize tags with prefixed_varint encoding
    hexi::prefixed_varint<std::vector<std::string>> tags_adaptor(packet.tags);
    tags_adaptor.serialize(buffer);

    // Serialize data with prefixed_varint encoding
    hexi::prefixed_varint<std::string> data_adaptor(packet.data);
    data_adaptor.serialize(buffer);

    return buffer;
}

CompactPacket deserialize_compact_packet(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {

    // Deserialize packet_id using varint decoding
    hexi::varint_decode(buffer, &packet.packet_id);

    // Deserialize tags with prefixed_varint decoding
    hexi::prefixed_varint<std::vector<std::string>> tags_adaptor(packet.tags);
    tags_adaptor.deserialize(buffer);

    // Deserialize data with prefixed_varint decoding

}

#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <string>
#include <cstdint>

struct PaddedData {
    uint16_t header;
    std::string data;
    uint32_t footer;
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_with_padding(const PaddedData& packet) {
    hexi::dynamic_buffer buffer;

    // Write header (2 bytes)
    buffer.write(&packet.header, sizeof(packet.header));

    // Write data with 4-byte prefix
    const uint32_t data_len = packet.data.size();
    buffer.write(&data_len, sizeof(data_len));
    buffer.write(packet.data.data(), data_len);

    // Write 16-byte padding filled with 0x00
    buffer.write(hexi::fill<16>(0x00));

    // Write footer (4 bytes)
    buffer.write(&packet.footer, sizeof(packet.footer));

    // Convert to std::vector and return
    return buffer.to_vector();
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/allocators/block_allocator.h>
#include <vector>
#include <memory>

struct PoolObject {
    int id;
    double value;
    
    // Default constructor required by block_allocator
    PoolObject() : id(0), value(0.0) {}
    
    PoolObject(int i, double v) : id(i), value(v) {}
};

std::vector<PoolObject*> create_object_pool(hexi::block_allocator<PoolObject, 10>& allocator) {
    std::vector<PoolObject*> pool;
    for (int i = 1; i <= 3; ++i) {
        PoolObject* obj = allocator.allocate();
        obj->id = i;
        obj->value = i * 1.5; // Example distinct values
        pool.push_back(obj);
    }
    return pool;
}
```</answer>

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_base.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstddef>

class CustomBuffer : public hexi::pmc::buffer_base {
    std::vector<std::byte> data_;
    
public:
    // Override the virtual methods from buffer_base
    std::size_t size() const override { return data_.size(); }
    [[nodiscard]]
    bool empty() const override { return data_.empty(); }

    // Helper method to add data (for testing)
    void add_data(const void* source, std::size_t length) {
        const std::byte* bytes = static_cast<const std::byte*>(source);
        data_.insert(data_.end(), bytes, bytes + length);
    }
    
    // Helper method to clear data (for testing)
    void clear() {
        data_.clear();
    }
};
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_read_adaptor.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_write_adaptor.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

std::vector<uint8_t> write_and_read_data(const std::vector<uint8_t>& input_data) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer(input_data.size());
    hexi::pmc::buffer_write_adaptor write_adaptor(buffer);
    
    // Write data to the buffer
    write_adaptor.write(input_data.data(), input_data.size());
    
    // Read data back from the buffer
    hexi::pmc::buffer_read_adaptor read_adaptor(buffer);
    std::vector<uint8_t> output(read_adaptor.size());
    read_adaptor.read(output.data(), output.size());
    
    return output;
}

std::vector<uint8_t> peek_data_without_advancing(const std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer_data, std::size_t peek_size) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> result(peek_size);
    hexi::pmc::buffer_read_adaptor read_adaptor(buffer_data);
    
    // Copy data without advancing the read cursor
    read_adaptor.copy(result.data(), peek_size);
    
    // Read to advance the read cursor (consumes the data)
    read_adaptor.read(result.data(), peek_size);
    
    return result;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_read_adaptor.h>
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_write_adaptor.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

struct TypedData {
    uint32_t id;
    int16_t value;
    double ratio;
};

std::vector<uint8_t> write_typed_data(const TypedData& data) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer;
    hexi::pmc::buffer_write_adaptor adaptor(buffer);
    adaptor.write(data.id);
    adaptor.write(data.value);
    adaptor.write(data.ratio);
    return buffer;
}

TypedData read_typed_data(const std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer) {
    TypedData data;
    hexi::pmc::buffer_read_adaptor adaptor(buffer);
    adaptor.read(&data.id);
    adaptor.read(&data.value);
    adaptor.read(&data.ratio);
    return data;
}

    adaptor.skip(sizeof(msg_id));

}
